description: Describes the shape of a CUDA memory segment.

members.name: width
members.description: Get/Set the width in pixels of the memory.

members.name: height
members.description: Get/Set the height in pixels of the memory.

members.name: numComps
members.description: Get/Set the number of color components per pixel of the memory.

members.name: depth
members.description: Get/Set the depth in pixels of the memory.

members.name: isCube
members.description: Get/Set whether this shape describes a cubemap. Depth must equal 6.

members.name: is3D
members.description: Get/Set whether this shape describes a 3D texture. If this is false and depth > 1, then it's a 2D array.

members.name: dataType
members.description: Get/Set the data type of each color component, as a numpy data type. E.g numpy.uint8, numpy.float32. Note that for uint8 data types, the channel ordering will be BGRA for 4 component textures. It will be RGBA however for other data types.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the CUDAMemoryShape Class wiki page
